description: TorrServer control service - manages the TorrServer process

services.name: com.torrserver.app.service
services.description: Downloads, starts, stops and monitors the TorrServer server

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start TorrServer (downloads it on first run)

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update TorrServer to the latest release

commands.name: getLogs
commands.description: Return the tail of the TorrServer log

commands.name: checkUpdate
commands.description: Check whether a newer TorrServer release exists

commands.name: launchLampa
commands.description: Launch the Lampa app if installed

commands.name: launchMediaPlayer
commands.description: Launch the TV media player (Photo/Video or MediaPlayer)

commands.name: getDeviceInfo
commands.description: Return the TV firmware and webOS version

commands.name: listStorage
commands.description: List USB storage for the torrent cache and the current cache path

commands.name: setStorage
commands.description: Set the torrent cache/downloads location (USB path or internal RAM)
